description: Intent catalog for /comfy-onboard. Maps creator-language goals to starter templates the agent can scaffold on first run. Keep entries short; the matcher uses keyword overlap plus LLM judgment.

goal_phrases: I want to make an image from text
intents.why: FLUX.1-schnell GGUF fits in ~6GB VRAM, runs in ~8 seconds per image, and produces strong results on the first try. No loras, no samplers to pick, no negative prompt — the smallest possible cliff.
intents.first_output_expectation: One 1024x1024 image from a prompt you provide. Runs locally if you have 6GB VRAM, or cloud via the Comfy Org API.
next_hops: swap to FLUX.1-dev for higher quality (slower)
add a LoRA loader for style control
try img2img by replacing EmptyLatentImage with LoadImage + VAEEncode

goal_phrases: fix the face in my image
intents.why: Impact Pack FaceDetailer is the most reliable face-fix pattern in ComfyUI. Detects faces, crops to bbox, runs a second KSampler pass at higher detail, composites back. No manual masking.
intents.first_output_expectation: Your input image with improved faces. Runs on top of an existing generation — bring your own image.
next_hops: stack with DetailerForEach for multi-face batches
swap the detailer model for SDXL or FLUX
add a person detector for full-body refinement

intents.why: Florence-2 is Microsoft's open multimodal VLM. This template exposes captioning, object detection, and OCR in one graph. Useful for dataset labeling and prompt reverse-engineering.
intents.first_output_expectation: A caption string + optional bounding boxes drawn on your input image.
next_hops: batch over a folder of images with an iterator node
pipe captions into a CLIPTextEncode to recreate the image
add Tagger for booru-style tag output

intents.why: MelBandRoFormer is the current SOTA open-source stem separator. This template loads one audio file and outputs vocals + instrumental stems in under 30 seconds on GPU.
intents.first_output_expectation: Two .wav files: vocals and instrumental. Source can be any format ffmpeg reads.
next_hops: chain with Whisper for lyrics transcription
add a pitch-shift node for key change
export as separate layers for a DAW

fallback.message: I don't have a starter for that exact goal yet — here are the four starters I can scaffold for you today. Tell me which is closest to what you want to make, or describe your goal in more detail and I'll pick the best match.

matching_rules.strategy: Prefer exact phrase match on goal_phrases first. If none, fall back to keyword overlap on tags. If still ambiguous, show the top 2 candidates and ask the user to pick. Never scaffold blindly — the user must confirm the starter before any file is written.
never_do: Pick a starter when the user's goal is outside the catalog (show fallback instead)
Rewrite a user's existing workflow.json — scaffolding always creates a new file
